title: Xau update
author: ResearcherPitiful224
selftext:
*XAUUSD UPDATE 🚨*

*INTRADAY BIAS = BULLISH*

*Yellow metal is forming a inverse head and shoulder in H1*

- After cpi y/y fell short at 2.7 the dxy has breached its immediate support at 98.00 signaling selling pressure.
- ⁠Xau near term support at 3340 and resistance at 3360.
- ⁠Traders waiting for unemployment claims before taking xau to new highs above 3400.
-

*TECHNICAL OVERVIEW ✅*
- RSI being neutral signaling uncertainty.
- ⁠EMA resistance at 3361.

*SIGNAL BASED ON ANALYSIS*

*BUY LIMIT 3362*
Target 1 - 3367
Target 2 - 3372
Target 3 3379
Sl - 3349

*Entry only after H1 bullish candle close and ltf confirmation*
